name: Perfect Chocolate Cake with Perfect Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Perfect Chocolate Cake:
1. Combine cocoa and boiling water, stirring until smooth. Set aside.
2. Cream butter; gradually add sugar, beating well. Add eggs one at a time.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture with cocoa mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Stir in vanilla.
5. Pour batter into two 10-inch pans. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30-40 minutes.
Whipped Cream Filling:
1. Beat whipping cream and vanilla until foamy. Gradually add powdered sugar.
2. Makes 1 cup.
Perfect Chocolate Frosting:
1. Combine chocolate, half-and-half, and powdered sugar in a saucepan. Cook until chocolate melts.
2. Remove from heat; add powdered sugar. Set pan in ice and beat until frosting holds its shape and loses its gloss.
3. Add a few more drops of half-and-half if needed to achieve the desired spreading consistency.
4. Makes 2 1/2 cups
